reasoning: The base rate from the Polymarket estimate was 0.04. Information found up to August/September 2025 shows Racing Bulls (VCARB) were in 8th place with 45 points after 14 races, behind Williams (who had 59 points earlier in July) and others like Sauber and Aston Martin. Upward mobility in the F1 Constructors' Championship is notoriously difficult for midfield teams because the top teams systematically lock out the major point-scoring positions (Top 8). Earning enough points to jump multiple places late in the season is extremely unlikely without several chaotic races. With only a few races remaining by November 2025, it's highly improbable that Racing Bulls will close the point deficit to 5th place, pushing the probability slightly below the market estimate of 0.04 to 0.03.
